title: API network create: Name is not being assigned correctly
body:
I'm calling the `/libpod/networks/create endpoint` and it's generating a wrong name.

Request
```bash
curl --request POST \
  --url http://192.168.1.15:8081/v4.0.0/libpod/networks/create \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
	"name": "test1"
}'
```

Response
```json
{
	"Filename": "/home/user/.config/cni/net.d/cni-podman14.conflist"
}
```

API reference: https://docs.podman.io/en/v3.2.3/_static/api.html#operation/NetworkCreateLibpod

comments.body:
please provide this info:
```
podman info
```
Sorry, I just noticed my server was using version 3.4.4. I installed in another computer with version 4.0.0, and it's working.
